description:
Add ex_doc and a `docs:` config so hexdocs renders (moduledoc coverage is already excellent — 57/57 modules, @spec on all public fns — but nothing renders it today).

- dep: `{:ex_doc, "~> 0.34", only: :dev, runtime: false}`
- `docs:` with `main: "Mix.Tasks.Mutagen"` (or README), `extras: ["README.md", "CHANGELOG.md"]`, and `groups_for_modules:` grouping mutators / pipeline facades / core.

Acceptance: `mix docs` builds without error and the README is the landing page.
title: Add ex_doc dep + docs config
